title: Nephrodium molle
taxonomy: Nephrodium molle is a genus of extinct ferns that belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, an ancient group of vascular plants. It is classified as a member of the division Pteridophyta, which comprises ferns and their allies. The genus Nephrodium is part of the family Matoniaaceae or Nephrolepidaceae, depending on the source. Nephrodium molle is a specific species within this genus, characterized by its distinctive morphology. This classification places Nephrodium molle within the larger context of fern evolution and taxonomy.
